mapper.select:
SELECT A.NOTI_SEQ , A.FILE_GB , C.SUB_CODE_NM AS NOTI_NM, B.USER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A.START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(A.END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DT, A.USE_YN , IFNULL(A.HOSP_CD,'') HOSP_CD , A.NOTI_TITLE , A.NOTI_CONTENT , A.UPDATE_SW , A.NOTI_REDCNT , A.REG_DTTM , A.REG_USER , A.REG_IP , A.UPD_DTTM , A.UPD_USER , A.UPD_IP , A.HOSP_UUID FROM TBL_NOTI_MST A , TBL_USER_MST B , TBL_CODE_DTL C WHERE 1=1 AND B.USER_ID = A.UPD_USER AND B.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID AND C.CODE_GB = 'Z' AND C.CODE_CD = 'NOTI_GB' AND C.SUB_CODE = A.FILE_GB AND DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y%m%d') BETWEEN REPLACE(A.START_DT,'-','') AND REPLACE(A.END_DT,'-','') AND DATE_FORMAT(A.UPD_DTTM,'%Y%m%d') BETWEEN REPLACE(#{start_date},'-','') AND REPLACE(#{end_date},'-','')
AND (A.NOTI_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
AND (A.NOTI_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
AND (A.NOTI_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR A.NOTI_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
order by A.UPD_DTTM DESC

SELECT A.NOTI_SEQ , A.FILE_GB , A.START_DT , A.END_DT , A.USE_YN , A.HOSP_CD , A.NOTI_TITLE , A.NOTI_CONTENT , A.UPDATE_SW , A.NOTI_REDCNT , A.REG_DTTM , A.REG_USER , A.REG_IP , A.UPD_DTTM , A.UPD_USER , A.UPD_IP , A.HOSP_UUID FROM TBL_NOTI_MST A WHERE 1=1 AND A.NOTI_SEQ = #{noti_seq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_NOTI_MST ( FILE_GB, START_DT, END_DT, USE_YN, HOSP_CD, NOTI_TITLE, NOTI_CONTENT, UPDATE_SW, NOTI_REDCNT, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP , HOSP_UUID ) VALUES ( #{file_gb}, REPLACE(#{start_dt} , '-', ''), REPLACE(#{end_dt} , '-', '') , #{use_yn}, #{hosp_cd}, #{noti_title}, #{noti_content}, #{update_sw}, #{noti_redcnt}, now(), #{reg_user}, #{reg_ip}, now(), #{upd_user}, #{upd_ip} , #{hosp_uuid} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_NOTI_MST SET START_DT = REPLACE(#{start_dt} , '-', ''), END_DT = REPLACE(#{end_dt} , '-', '') , USE_YN = #{use_yn}, HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd}, NOTI_TITLE = #{noti_title}, NOTI_CONTENT = #{noti_content}, UPDATE_SW = #{update_sw}, UPD_DTTM = now(), UPD_USER = #{upd_user}, UPD_IP = #{upd_ip} , HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} WHERE NOTI_SEQ = #{noti_seq} AND FILE_GB = #{file_gb}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.HOSP_CD, A.FILE_GB, A.QSTN_TITLE, A.ASQ_SEQ , B.USER_NM , C.HOSP_NM , A.QSTN_CONTS, A.ASQ_SHARE, IFNULL(A.ANSR_CONTS,'') ANSR_CONTS , A.UPDATE_SW, A.REG_DTTM, A.REG_USER, A.REG_IP, A.READ_CNT , A.UPD_DTTM, A.UPD_USER, A.UPD_IP, A.ANSR_DTTM, A.ANSR_USER, A.ANSR_IP, A.ANSR_UPD_DTTM, A.ANSR_UPD_USER, A.ANSR_UPD_IP , A.HOSP_UUID , A.QSTN_WAN , A.ANSR_WAN , CASE WHEN A.QSTN_WAN = 'Y' THEN '질문완료' ELSE '질문진행' END QSTN_STAT , CASE WHEN A.ANSR_WAN = 'Y' THEN '답변완료' ELSE '답변진행' END ANSR_STAT FROM TBL_ASQ_MST A , TBL_USER_MST B , TBL_HOSP_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND B.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID AND B.USER_ID = A.UPD_USER AND C.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID
AND (A.QSTN_TITLE LIKE CONCAT(#{qstn_title},'%') OR A.QSTN_CONTS LIKE CONCAT(#{qstn_title},'%') )
Order by A.UPD_DTTM DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ASQ_MST ( HOSP_CD, FILE_GB, QSTN_TITLE, QSTN_CONTS, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP, HOSP_UUID , QSTN_WAN ) VALUES ( #{hosp_cd}, #{file_gb}, #{qstn_title}, #{qstn_conts}, NOW(), #{reg_user}, #{reg_ip}, NOW(), #{upd_user}, #{upd_ip}, #{hosp_uuid} , #{qstn_wan} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_ASQ_MST SET QSTN_TITLE = #{qstn_title}, QSTN_CONTS = #{qstn_conts}, UPDATE_SW = #{update_sw}, UPD_DTTM = NOW(), UPD_USER = #{upd_user}, UPD_IP = #{upd_ip} , QSTN_WAN = #{qstn_wan} WHERE ASQ_SEQ = #{asq_seq} AND FILE_GB = #{file_gb}
mapper.select: SELECT QSTN_TITLE , QSTN_CONTS , QSTN_WAN , ANSR_CONTS , ANSR_WAN , UPDATE_SW , UPD_DTTM , UPD_USER , UPD_IP FROM TBL_ASQ_MST WHERE ASQ_SEQ = #{asq_seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_ASQ_MST SET ASQ_SHARE = #{asq_share}, ANSR_CONTS = #{ansr_conts}, ANSR_DTTM = NOW(), ANSR_USER = #{ansr_user}, ANSR_IP = #{ansr_ip} , ANSR_UPD_DTTM = NOW(), ANSR_UPD_USER = #{ansr_upd_user}, ANSR_UPD_IP = #{ansr_upd_ip} , ANSR_WAN = #{ansr_wan} WHERE ASQ_SEQ = #{asq_seq} AND FILE_GB = #{file_gb}
mapper.select: SELECT HOSP_UUID, LIC_NUM, DATE_FORMAT(IP_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') IP_DT , USER_ID, USER_NM, LIC_TYPE, LIC_DETAIL, DATE_FORMAT(LIC_STR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') LIC_STR_DT , JUMIN_ID, DATE_FORMAT(TE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') TE_DT , HOSP_CD, USE_YN, DEPT_CODE, DATE_FORMAT(START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DT , DEPT_NAME, STAT_NAME, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP FROM TBL_HOSPEMP_MST WHERE 1=1 AND HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} AND LIC_NUM = #{lic_num} AND IP_DT = REPLACE(#{ip_dt},'-','')

SELECT A.HOSP_UUID, A.LIC_NUM, DATE_FORMAT(A.IP_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') IP_DT , A.USER_ID, A.USER_NM, B.HOSP_NM , A.LIC_TYPE, CASE WHEN A.LIC_TYPE <> '' THEN (SELECT SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE CODE_CD = 'LIC_TYPE' AND SUB_CODE = A.LIC_TYPE) ELSE '' END SUB_CODE_NM , A.LIC_DETAIL, DATE_FORMAT(A.LIC_STR_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') LIC_STR_DT , A.JUMIN_ID, DATE_FORMAT(A.TE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') TE_DT , A.HOSP_CD, A.USE_YN, A.DEPT_CODE, DATE_FORMAT(A.START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(A.END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DT , A.DEPT_NAME, A.STAT_NAME, A.REG_DTTM, A.REG_USER, A.REG_IP, A.UPD_DTTM, A.UPD_USER, A.UPD_IP FROM TBL_HOSPEMP_MST A , TBL_HOSP_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND B.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID
AND (A.LIC_NUM LIKE CONCAT(#{user_nm},'%') OR A.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT(#{user_nm},'%') )
Order by A.USER_NM ASC , A.IP_DT ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_HOSPEMP_MST ( HOSP_UUID, LIC_NUM, IP_DT, USER_ID, USER_NM, LIC_TYPE, LIC_DETAIL, LIC_STR_DT, JUMIN_ID, TE_DT, HOSP_CD, USE_YN, DEPT_CODE, START_DT, END_DT, DEPT_NAME, STAT_NAME, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP ) VALUES ( #{hosp_uuid}, #{lic_num}, REPLACE(#{ip_dt},'-',''), #{user_id}, #{user_nm}, #{lic_type}, #{lic_detail}, REPLACE(#{lic_str_dt},'-',''), #{jumin_id}, REPLACE(#{te_dt},'-',''), #{hosp_cd}, #{use_yn}, #{dept_code}, REPLACE(#{start_dt},'-',''), REPLACE(#{end_dt},'-',''), #{dept_name}, #{stat_name}, NOW(), #{reg_user}, #{reg_ip}, NOW(), #{upd_user}, #{upd_ip} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_HOSPEMP_MST SET USER_ID = #{user_id}, USER_NM = #{user_nm}, LIC_TYPE = #{lic_type}, LIC_DETAIL = #{lic_detail}, LIC_STR_DT = REPLACE(#{lic_str_dt},'-',''), JUMIN_ID = #{jumin_id}, TE_DT = REPLACE(#{te_dt},'-',''), HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, DEPT_CODE = #{dept_code}, START_DT = REPLACE(#{start_dt},'-',''), END_DT = REPLACE(#{end_dt},'-',''), DEPT_NAME = #{dept_name}, STAT_NAME = #{stat_name}, UPD_DTTM = NOW(), UPD_USER = #{upd_user}, UPD_IP = #{upd_ip} WHERE 1=1 AND HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} AND LIC_NUM = #{lic_num} AND IP_DT = REPLACE(#{ip_dt},'-','')
mapper.select:
SELECT A.SEQ , A.HOSP_UUID, A.LIC_NUM, DATE_FORMAT(B.IP_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') IP_DT , B.USER_ID, B.USER_NM, C.HOSP_NM , A.VAC_GB, CASE WHEN B.LIC_TYPE <> '' THEN (SELECT SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE CODE_CD = 'LIC_TYPE' AND SUB_CODE = B.LIC_TYPE) ELSE '' END SUB_DEP_NM , CASE WHEN A.VAC_GB <> '' THEN (SELECT SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE CODE_CD = 'VAC_GB' AND SUB_CODE = A.VAC_GB) ELSE '' END SUB_CODE_NM , B.LIC_DETAIL, DATE_FORMAT(B.IP_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') IP_DT , DATE_FORMAT(B.TE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') TE_DT , DATE_FORMAT(A.VAC_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') VAC_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(A.VAC_END_DT , '%Y-%m-%d') VAC_END_DT , A.SUB_NAME , DATE_FORMAT(A.SUB_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') SUB_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(A.SUB_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') SUB_END_DT , A.WARD_NM , A.WARD_DAN , DATE_FORMAT(A.WARD_START_DT , '%Y-%m-%d') WARD_START_DT, DATE_FORMAT(A.WARD_END_DT , '%Y-%m-%d') WARD_END_DT, A.ECCH_YN , A.UPD_DTTM, A.UPD_USER, A.UPD_IP FROM TBL_LICWORK_TBL A , TBL_HOSPEMP_MST B , TBL_HOSP_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND C.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID AND B.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID AND B.LIC_NUM = A.LIC_NUM
AND (B.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT(#{user_nm},'%') OR B.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT(#{user_nm},'%') )
Order by B.USER_NM ASC , B.IP_DT ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_LICWORK_TBL ( HOSP_UUID, LIC_NUM, HOSP_CD, VAC_GB, VAC_START_DT, VAC_END_DT, SUB_NAME, SUB_START_DT, SUB_END_DT, WARD_NM, WARD_DAN, WARD_START_DT, WARD_END_DT, ECCH_YN, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP ) VALUES ( #{hosp_uuid}, #{lic_num}, #{hosp_cd}, #{vac_gb}, REPLACE(#{vac_start_dt},'-',''), REPLACE(#{vac_end_dt},'-',''), #{sub_name}, REPLACE(#{sub_start_dt},'-',''), REPLACE(#{sub_end_dt},'-',''), #{ward_nm}, #{ward_dan}, REPLACE(#{ward_start_dt},'-',''), REPLACE(#{ward_end_dt},'-',''), #{ecch_yn}, NOW(), #{upd_user}, #{upd_ip} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_LICWORK_TBL SET LIC_NUM = #{lic_num}, HOSP_CD = #{hosp_cd}, VAC_GB = #{vac_gb}, VAC_START_DT = #{vac_start_dt}, VAC_END_DT = #{vac_end_dt}, SUB_NAME = #{sub_name}, SUB_START_DT = #{sub_start_dt}, SUB_END_DT = #{sub_end_dt}, WARD_NM = #{ward_nm}, WARD_DAN = #{ward_dan}, WARD_START_DT = #{ward_start_dt}, WARD_END_DT = #{ward_end_dt}, ECCH_YN = #{ecch_yn}, UPD_DTTM = NOW(), UPD_USER = #{upd_user}, UPD_IP = #{upd_ip} WHERE HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} AND SEQ = #{seq}
mapper.select: SELECT A.LIC_NUM , A.HOSP_CD , A.VAC_GB , A.VAC_START_DT , A.VAC_END_DT , B.LIC_DETAIL , CASE WHEN B.LIC_TYPE <> '' THEN (SELECT SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE CODE_CD = 'LIC_TYPE' AND SUB_CODE = B.LIC_TYPE) ELSE '' END SUB_DEP_NM , A.SUB_NAME , B.USER_NM , C.HOSP_NM , A.SUB_START_DT , A.SUB_END_DT , A.WARD_NM , A.WARD_DAN , A.WARD_START_DT , A.WARD_END_DT , A.ECCH_YN , A.UPD_DTTM , A.UPD_USER , A.UPD_IP , B.IP_DT , B.TE_DT FROM TBL_LICWORK_TBL A , TBL_HOSPEMP_MST B , TBL_HOSP_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND C.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID AND B.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID AND B.LIC_NUM = A.LIC_NUM AND A.HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} AND SEQ = #{seq}

SELECT A.HOSP_CD , B.HOSP_NM , A.START_DT , A.URL_PATH , A.HOSP_UUID , A.END_DT , A.USE_YN , A.BIGO , A.REG_DTTM , A.REG_USER , A.REG_IP , A.UPD_DTTM , A.UPD_USER , A.UPD_IP FROM TBL_URL_MST A , TBL_HOSP_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND B.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID AND A.HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} AND A.START_DT = REPLACE(#{start_dt},'-','') AND A.URL_PATH = #{url_path}

SELECT B.HOSP_CD , B.HOSP_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A.START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') START_DT , A.URL_PATH , (SELECT SUB_CODE_NM FROM TBL_CODE_DTL WHERE CODE_CD = 'URL_PATH' AND SUB_CODE = A.URL_PATH) SUB_CODE_NM , A.HOSP_UUID , C.USER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A.END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') END_DT , A.USE_YN , A.BIGO , A.REG_DTTM , A.REG_USER , A.REG_IP , A.UPD_DTTM , A.UPD_USER , A.UPD_IP FROM TBL_URL_MST A , TBL_HOSP_MST B , TBL_USER_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND A.HOSP_UUID = #{hosp_uuid} AND B.HOSP_UUID = A.HOSP_UUID AND C.HOSP_UUID = B.HOSP_UUID AND C.USER_ID = A.UPD_USER
AND (A.URL_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#{url_path},'%') OR A.URL_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#{url_path},'%') )
Order by C.USER_NM ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_URL_MST ( HOSP_CD , HOSP_UUID , START_DT, URL_PATH, END_DT, USE_YN, BIGO, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP ) VALUES ( #{hosp_cd}, #{hosp_uuid} , REPLACE(#{start_dt},'-','') , #{url_path}, REPLACE(#{end_dt},'-','') , #{use_yn}, #{bigo}, NOW(), #{reg_user}, #{reg_ip}, NOW(), #{upd_user}, #{upd_ip} )
